name: Appetizer Cheesecake#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil a 7 to 9-inch pie pan.
2. Cover the bottom with half of the crushed crackers.
3. Blend the cream cheese with the remaining ingredients until smooth.
4. Spread the mixture over the crackers in the pie pan.
5. Sprinkle the remaining crackers on top.
6. Cover and refrigerate overnight. This can be used as a dip.
